---
title: "syn_pipeline"
generated: true
description: "Staged rigid -> affine -> SyN registration in one call."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register.recipes`](../nitrix-register-recipes.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:syn_pipeline -->
```python
syn_pipeline(moving: Float[Array, '*spatial'], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, transform: Literal['rigid', 'affine', 'syn'] = 'syn', rigid_spec: Optional[RegistrationSpec] = None, affine_spec: Optional[RegistrationSpec] = None, syn_spec: Optional[SyNSpec] = None, force: Optional[Union[Force, Sequence[Force]]] = None, affine_restarts: Optional[int] = None) -> PipelineResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:syn_pipeline -->
Staged rigid -> affine -> SyN registration in one call.

The `antsRegistrationSyN` workhorse, composed from the leaf recipes: each
stage **warm-starts** the next -- rigid (moment init) seeds affine
(`init_transform`), the affine result seeds SyN (`init_affine`) -- so
the SyN stage's returned `displacement` is the **full** fixed -> moving
map (linear + non-linear).  `apply_transform(image, result)` then applies
the whole composite.  Numerics only -- no image I/O (`thrux`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:syn_pipeline -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `moving` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Single-channel images sharing a grid (the `IndexSpace` norm). |
| `fixed` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Single-channel images sharing a grid (the `IndexSpace` norm). |
| `transform` | `Literal['rigid', 'affine', 'syn']` | — | `'syn'` | How far to stage: `'rigid'`, `'affine'`, or `'syn'` (default). |
| `rigid_spec` | `Optional[RegistrationSpec]` | — | `None` | Per-stage configuration; `None` -> a cross-modal-robust default (`MI` linear stages, the default `LNCCForce` SyN -- the antsRegistrationSyN convention). For a faster **within-modality** run pass `SSD` linear specs (the inverse-compositional fast path). |
| `affine_spec` | `Optional[RegistrationSpec]` | — | `None` | Per-stage configuration; `None` -> a cross-modal-robust default (`MI` linear stages, the default `LNCCForce` SyN -- the antsRegistrationSyN convention). For a faster **within-modality** run pass `SSD` linear specs (the inverse-compositional fast path). |
| `syn_spec` | `Optional[SyNSpec]` | — | `None` | Per-stage configuration; `None` -> a cross-modal-robust default (`MI` linear stages, the default `LNCCForce` SyN -- the antsRegistrationSyN convention). For a faster **within-modality** run pass `SSD` linear specs (the inverse-compositional fast path). |
| `force` | `Optional[Union[Force, Sequence[Force]]]` | — | `None` | Per-stage configuration; `None` -> a cross-modal-robust default (`MI` linear stages, the default `LNCCForce` SyN -- the antsRegistrationSyN convention). For a faster **within-modality** run pass `SSD` linear specs (the inverse-compositional fast path). |
| `affine_restarts` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Multi-start count for the affine stage; `None` -> `4` for a histogram (`MI` / `CorrelationRatio`) affine metric (the non-deterministic GPU scatter), else `1`. |

**Returns** `PipelineResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:syn_pipeline -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
